mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pr_heat_archive ( id, org_id, house_id, meter_num, meter_arc_code, meter_arc_name, meter_serial, specification, model, concentrator_code, dtu_num, dtu_type, start_reading, current_reading, total_used, trade_times, total_money, total_recharge, current_balance, standard_id, standard_name, standard_price, card_num, imei, device_id, chan_num, install_site, install_type, is_changed, create_by, create_time ) SELECT id, org_id, house_id, meter_num, meter_arc_code, meter_arc_name, meter_serial, specification, model, concentrator_code, dtu_num, dtu_type, COALESCE(start_reading, 0), COALESCE(current_reading, 0), COALESCE(total_used, 0), COALESCE(trade_times, 0), COALESCE(total_money, 0), COALESCE(total_recharge, '0'), COALESCE(current_balance, 0), standard_id, standard_name, standard_price, card_num, imei, device_id, chan_num, install_site, install_type, 0, #{createBy}, NOW() FROM pr_import_heat WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND type = 0
